name: Peasant
effect: Once per turn| you can gain 1 for each Area in the same row.

name: Rogue
effect: Once per turn| move 1 card to the bottom of the deck to reveal a card from records or void.

name: Hunter
effect: When this is moved to the board| roll 1 extra die.

name: Archer
effect: Once per turn| you can multiply the roll value of 1 die by 2.

name: Knight
effect: While this is on the board| you can change the position of cards on the board.

name: Wizard
effect: Numbers listed on the card above Wizard get +1. Numbers on the card below get -1.

name: Queen
effect: When this is moved to the board| reveal a card.

name: King
effect: Once per turn| if you haven’t voided a card this turn| roll 1 extra die.

name: Undead
effect: While this is in records| you can pay d5 to swap it with a character on the board.

name: Skeleton
effect: Void a card on the board to roll 1 extra die.

name: Necromancer
effect: Once per turn| you can reveal a Fiend from records or void.

name: Ghost
effect: When this is voided| record 1 card on the board for free.

name: Wolf
effect: Whenever you roll a 3| mill 3.

name: Bear
effect: When a character is revealed| send it to the void.

name: Catnsnake
effect: Once per turn you can reroll 1 die.

name: Dragon
effect: If Knight| Rogue| and Wizard are on the board| you can send them to records. Void a structure whenever you roll a 6.

name: Jester
effect: When this is moved to the board| gain 1. When it leaves| loose 1.

name: Wall
effect: Whenever die roll value becomes 6| set it to 3.

name: Gate
effect: When a character is moved to the scene| gain 1.

name: Tower
effect: While this is on board| you can activate the effect of the top records card.

name: Castle
effect: You can activate ?once per turn? card effects of cards in the same row 2 times per turn.

name: Catapult
effect: Once per turn| you can move 1 creature or item from the board to the bottom of the deck.

name: Cliff
effect: Roll 1 less die at the start of the turn. Once per turn| gain 3.

name: Swamp
effect: Roll 1 extra die at the start of the turn. All die rolls are reduced by 2.

name: Forest
effect: If there is a 1| 2| 3 cost card on the board. You can send them to records with Forest.

name: Forge
effect: Once per turn| you can merge dice.

name: Sawmill
effect: Once per turn| you can split a die.

name: Mine
effect: Once per turn| when an item is voided| you can reveal it.

name: Farm
effect: Once per turn| you can mill 1 to gain 3.

name: Inn
effect: When this is placed on the board| move all characters to the  bottom of the deck. Then, reveal 1 card per returned character.

name: Bank
effect: Once per turn| you can place a die on the Bank card to store it for the next turn.

name: Casino
effect: Roll 1 extra die. If roll is 1|2 or 3| mill that many cards.

name: Tomb
effect: When this is revealed| you can place it on top of a character on the board. When tomb is moved| character under it moves with it.

name: Gold
effect: Void this to increase any number by 1 until the next turn.

name: Silver
effect: Void this to reduce any number by 1 until the next turn.

name: Ruby
effect: Void this to to roll an extra die.

name: Emerald
effect: Void this| to set any number to 3 until the end of the turn.

name: Garbage
effect: When this is moved| loose 1.

name: Ale
effect: You can send this to records to reroll all dice.

name: Map
effect: When an area is voided| you can send this to records to reveal 1 area from void.

name: Scroll
effect: Void this| until the end of the turn| when you record a card| you can record 1 more card for free if it’s cost is lower by 1.
